nodes.name: Receive WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: Entry: POST /webhook/saas/ai-agent. Accepts forwarded messages from webhook-receiver or direct Meta webhook. Payload: {store_id, phone, order_id?, message_text, message_type?, language?}

nodes.name: Validate & Extract
nodes.notes: Validates required fields (store_id, phone, message_text). Sanitizes phone, truncates message to 4096 chars. Generates idempotency key.

nodes.name: Valid Input?
nodes.notes: Routes valid input to store fetch, invalid to 400 error response.

nodes.name: Error Response 400
nodes.notes: Returns 400 with missing field details.

nodes.name: Find Store
nodes.notes: Fetches store config by store_id. Returns single object via Accept header.

nodes.name: Store Found?
nodes.notes: If store not found or inactive, returns 404 error.

nodes.name: Store Error Response
nodes.notes: Returns 404 if store not found.

nodes.name: Get AI Settings
nodes.notes: Calls get_ai_settings RPC. Returns merchant AI config with defaults if not set. Ensures merchant isolation — each store gets its own settings.

nodes.name: AI Enabled?
nodes.notes: Checks if AI agent is enabled for this merchant. Each merchant controls this independently.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ {"success": false, "error": "AI agent is disabled for this store", "store_id": $json.id} }}

nodes.name: AI Disabled Response
nodes.notes: Returns 403 if AI agent is disabled for this merchant.

nodes.name: Find Latest Customer Order
nodes.notes: Finds the latest order by phone number for this store. Orders sorted by created_at desc.

nodes.name: Order Found?
nodes.notes: If no order found for this phone number, returns 404. Otherwise continues to load conversation history.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ {"success": false, "error": "No order found for this phone number", "phone": $json._phone} }}

nodes.name: Order Error Response
nodes.notes: Returns 404 if no matching order.

nodes.name: Load Conversation History
nodes.notes: Loads last 20 messages from ai_conversations for context. Max 20 messages per order.

nodes.name: Build Prompt & Check Escalation
nodes.notes: Builds OpenAI messages array with: merchant system prompt, order info, conversation history, response rules. Checks if message count >= 8 for auto-escalation.

nodes.name: Call OpenAI GPT-4o-mini
nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI Chat Completions API. Uses response_format: json_object to enforce JSON-only responses. Model and temperature from merchant AI settings.

nodes.name: Parse AI JSON Response
nodes.notes: Extracts intent, reply, confidence from OpenAI JSON response. Falls back to regex extraction if JSON.parse fails. Tracks tokens and latency.

nodes.name: High Confidence?
nodes.notes: Checks: 1) confidence >= min_confidence (default 0.65), 2) message count < 8 (auto-escalation), 3) no parse error. Failing any → escalate to human.

nodes.name: Escalate to Human
nodes.notes: Forces human escalation when: low confidence, parse error, or >8 messages exchanged. Sets intent to 'human' with handoff message.

nodes.name: Route Intent
nodes.notes: Routes to intent handler based on AI's detected intent. Unknown intent falls back to 'question' handler.

nodes.name: Handle Confirm
nodes.notes: Updates order status to confirmed. Inserts activity record. Notifies merchant downstream.

nodes.name: Handle Cancel
nodes.notes: Updates order status to cancelled. Inserts activity record.

nodes.name: Handle Change Address
nodes.notes: Updates wilaya and commune on the order based on AI-parsed address.

nodes.name: Handle Change Phone
nodes.notes: Extracts new phone number from AI reply and updates order. Phone numbers are validated to be 10-15 digits.

nodes.name: Handle Change Wilaya
nodes.notes: Extracts new wilaya (province) from AI reply and updates order.

nodes.name: Handle Change Commune
nodes.notes: Extracts new commune (city) from AI reply and updates order.

nodes.name: Handle Question
nodes.notes: No DB update needed for questions. Just passes through to reply.

nodes.name: Handle Human Escalation
nodes.notes: Creates notification for merchant that human support is needed. Does not update order status.

nodes.name: Save AI Reply to History
nodes.notes: Saves the AI's reply message to ai_conversations table for conversation continuity.

nodes.name: Save AI Analytics Log
nodes.notes: Logs AI interaction analytics: intent, confidence, latency, model, tokens, escalation status.

nodes.name: Notify Merchant
nodes.notes: Inserts notification for merchant. Notification type varies by intent: confirmed, cancelled, escalated, modified.

nodes.name: Build WhatsApp Payload
nodes.notes: Builds Meta WhatsApp Cloud API payload. Uses store's phone_number_id and access_token. Truncates to 4096 char limit.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Reply
nodes.notes: Sends AI reply via Meta WhatsApp Cloud API. Continue on Fail enabled for error tracking.

nodes.name: Acknowledge
nodes.notes: Returns 200 with intent, reply, confidence, escalation status, latency, and token usage.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches any unhandled error in the workflow. Routes to dead letter queue for investigation.

nodes.name: Format Error for DLQ
nodes.notes: Formats error data for dead letter queue. Extracts error message, code, and input context.

nodes.name: Insert Dead Letter Queue
nodes.notes: Inserts error into dead_letter_queue table for monitoring and replay.
